病毒從來都「殺」．不到，如流感你好返不是因你食藥，好大程度上係自己免疫系統嬴左姐~!

replies.msg:
酒精：酒精高度揮發性，令微生物脫水及凝固，最終微生物蛋白變性達到消毒效果。

漂白水：含次氯酸鈉，分子細到可進入侵微生物內部，與核蛋白質(DNA/RNA)產生氧化作用，使其失去活性。

簡單講，酒精同同含次氯酸鈉NaClO( 要有合適比例)既產品如漂白水可殺病毒
仲有100度高溫

https://www.nea.gov.sg/our-services/public-cleanliness/environmental-cleaning-guidelines/guidelines/interim-list-of-household-products-and-active-ingredients-for-disinfection-of-novel-coronavirus

有無答到你

大家睇清楚，d 消毒野寫既殺死99.9% 菌係講咩先啦
金黃葡萄菌
大腸桿菌
念珠菌
沙門氏菌
綠膿桿菌等等

唔係話殺肺炎病毒

所以果D 消毒抺手紙好多係無咩用(係肺炎病毒上面)

生物用酒精/死物用含次氯酸鈉漂白水

其實 啡色個啲消毒藥水 溝成1:49 拎黎當搓手/周圍屋企噴 作消毒得唔得？

第一次係連登覆post...

其實滴露active ingredient係 Chloroxylenol/ parachlorometaxylenol , 對新型N-COV 2019應該未有研究. 不過我地可以用以前冠狀病毒ge研究作為reference:

原來正反兩方都有:

反方代表:
1. Wood, A., and D. Payne."The action of three antiseptics/disinfectants against enveloped and non-enveloped viruses." Journal of Hospital Infection 38.4 (1998): 283-295.
- Results indicate that all products were effective in inactivating the enveloped viruses herpes simplex virus type 1 and human immunodeficiency virus type 1, whilst being ineffective in inactivating human coronavirus, also enveloped, and the non-enveloped viruses.

正方代表
Dellanno, Christine, Quinn Vega, and Diane Boesenberg. "The antiviral action of common household disinfectants and antiseptics against murine hepatitis virus, a potential surrogate for SARS coronavirus." American journal of infection control 37.8 (2009): 649-652.
- It was determined, when common household disinfectants or antiseptics, containing either 0.050% of triclosan, 0.12% of PCMX parachlorometaxylenol, 0.21% of sodium hypochlorite, 0.23% of pine oil, or 0.10% of a quaternary compound with 79.0% of ethanol, provided at least a 3-log reduction of the virus from the surface without any virus recovered in any of the wells within a 30-second contact time.

新加波guideline可用黎參考下
https://www.nea.gov.sg/our-services/public-cleanliness/environmental-cleaning-guidelines/guidelines/interim-list-of-household-products-and-active-ingredients-for-disinfection-of-novel-coronavirus

結論:
無人知道滴露能否有效減低武漢肺炎傳染性. 對以往ge冠狀病毒就有爭議.
最有醫學證據就係用最傳統ge稀釋漂白水(至少要有1,000ppm)
不過宜家物資短缺,全民搶購, 漂白水都難買, 有咩就用住先啦.

Dellanno, Christine, Quinn Vega, and Diane Boesenberg. "The antiviral action of common household disinfectants and antiseptics against murine hepatitis virus, a potential surrogate for SARS coronavirus." American journal of infection control 37.8 (2009): 649-652.
- It was determined, when common household disinfectants or antiseptics, containing either 0.050% of triclosan, 0.12% of PCMX parachlorometaxylenol, 0.21% of sodium hypochlorite, 0.23% of pine oil, or 0.10% of a quaternary compound with 79.0% of ethanol, provided at least a 3-log reduction of the virus from the surface without any virus recovered in any of the wells within a 30-second contact time.

新加波guideline可用黎參考下
https://www.nea.gov.sg/our-services/public-cleanliness/environmental-cleaning-guidelines/guidelines/interim-list-of-household-products-and-active-ingredients-for-disinfection-of-novel-coronavirus

結論:
無人知道滴露能否有效減低武漢肺炎傳染性. 對以往ge冠狀病毒就有爭議.
最有醫學證據就係用最傳統ge稀釋漂白水(至少要有1,000ppm)
不過宜家物資短缺,全民搶購, 漂白水都難買, 有咩就用住先啦.
上面星加波個網話有效殺新型冠狀病毒

認真答你

洗手液 梘液呢啲係用表面活性劑沖走手上嘅微生物 從而達到清潔你雙手嘅結果
係咪殺菌洗手液係唔重要
一般嘅洗手液已經足夠
而FDA更加唔建議用殺菌洗手液
https://www.fda.gov/consumers/consumer-updates/antibacterial-soap-you-can-skip-it-use-plain-soap-and-water

消毒劑就有好多種
70%-80%酒精 漂白水 呢啲係有效殺滅病毒嘅
消毒物件可以用酒精 漂白水
https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Disinfectant

而滴露得唔得 就真係答你唔到
但滴露洗手液 沖涼液 係可以照用嘅
